changes.text: Filters no longer applied on athlete profile pages (`/athletes/*`) — filter state is preserved and resumes on return to the dashboard
Bulk kudos counter and filter info text no longer overwrite each other — split into two separate rows in the status area
Bulk kudos no longer targets the logged-in user's own activities — own activities are detected and skipped to avoid incorrectly opening the kudos-giver list

releases.description: Bulk kudos — give kudos to all visible un-kudo'd activities with a single click.

changes.text: Bulk kudos button next to the group filter dropdown — one click to kudo all visible un-kudo'd activities
Progress indicator shows kudos count during bulk operation
Pulsing animation on button while bulk kudos are in progress

releases.description: Persistent filter state and stability fixes.

changes.text: Persist athlete selection across page reloads
Persist active group filter across page reloads
Fixed infinite recursion in alphabeticalSort in popup.js

releases.description: Initial release — custom athlete groups, feed filtering, and browser store listings.

changes.text: Create and manage custom athlete groups
Filter Strava feed by group, ungrouped athletes, or activities without kudos
Batch athlete selection with paginated sidebar UI
Export/import groups for backup and cross-browser transfer
Local storage only — no data sent to external servers
